children.heading: Requirements applicable to regulated investment companies
children.label: a Requirements applicable to regulated investment companies
A
children.text: 90 percent of its investment company taxable income for the taxable year determined without regard to subsection (b)(2)(D); and

children.label: B
children.text: 90 percent of the excess of (i) its interest income excludable from gross income under section 103(a) over (ii) its deductions disallowed under sections 265 and 171(a)(2), and

children.label: A
children.text: the provisions of this part applied to the investment company for all taxable years ending on or after , orNovember 8, 1983

children.label: B
children.text: as of the close of the taxable year, the investment company has no earnings and profits accumulated in any taxable year to which the provisions of this part (or the corresponding provisions of prior law) did not apply to it.

children.heading: Method of taxation of companies and shareholders
children.label: b Method of taxation of companies and shareholders

children.heading: Imposition of tax on regulated investment companies
children.label: 1 Imposition of tax on regulated investment companies
children.text: There is hereby imposed for each taxable year upon the investment company taxable income of every regulated investment company a tax computed as provided in section 11, as though the investment company taxable income were the taxable income referred to in section 11.

children.label: A
children.text: There shall be excluded the amount of the net capital gain, if any.

children.label: B
children.text: The net operating loss deduction provided in section 172 shall not be allowed.

children.label: C
children.text: The deductions for corporations provided in part VIII (except section 248) in subchapter B (section 241 and following, relating to the deduction for dividends received, etc.) shall not be allowed.

children.label: D
children.text: The deduction for dividends paid (as defined in section 561) shall be allowed, but shall be computed without regard to capital gain dividends and exempt-interest dividends.

children.label: E
children.text: The taxable income shall be computed without regard to section 443(b) (relating to computation of tax on change of annual accounting period).

children.label: F
children.text: The taxable income shall be computed without regard to section 454(b) (relating to short-term obligations issued on a discount basis) if the company so elects in a manner prescribed by the Secretary.

children.label: G
children.text: There shall be deducted an amount equal to the tax imposed by subsections (d)(2) and (i) of section 851 for the taxable year.

children.heading: Imposition of tax
children.label: A Imposition of tax
children.text: There is hereby imposed for each taxable year in the case of every regulated investment company a tax, determined as provided in section 11(b), on the excess, if any, of the net capital gain over the deduction for dividends paid (as defined in section 561) determined with reference to capital gain dividends only.

children.heading: Treatment of capital gain dividends by shareholders
children.label: B Treatment of capital gain dividends by shareholders
children.text: A capital gain dividend shall be treated by the shareholders as a gain from the sale or exchange of a capital asset held for more than 1 year.

children.heading: Definition of capital gain dividend
children.label: C Definition of capital gain dividend

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), a capital gain dividend is any dividend, or part thereof, which is reported by the company as a capital gain dividend in written statements furnished to its shareholders.

children.label: I
children.text: the reported capital gain dividend amount, over

children.label: II
children.text: the excess reported amount which is allocable to such reported capital gain dividend amount.

children.heading: Allocation of excess reported amount
children.label: iii Allocation of excess reported amount

children.heading: In general
children.label: I In general
children.text: Except as provided in subclause (II), the excess reported amount (if any) which is allocable to the reported capital gain dividend amount is that portion of the excess reported amount which bears the same ratio to the excess reported amount as the reported capital gain dividend amount bears to the aggregate reported amount.

children.heading: Special rule for noncalendar year taxpayers
children.label: II Special rule for noncalendar year taxpayers
children.text: In the case of any taxable year which does not begin and end in the same calendar year, if the post-December reported amount equals or exceeds the excess reported amount for such taxable year, subclause (I) shall be applied by substituting “post-December reported amount” for “aggregate reported amount” and no excess reported amount shall be allocated to any dividend paid on or before December 31 of such taxable year.

children.heading: Reported capital gain dividend amount
children.label: I Reported capital gain dividend amount
children.text: The term “reported capital gain dividend amount” means the amount reported to its shareholders under clause (i) as a capital gain dividend.

children.heading: Excess reported amount
children.label: II Excess reported amount
children.text: The term “excess reported amount” means the excess of the aggregate reported amount over the net capital gain of the company for the taxable year.

children.heading: Aggregate reported amount
children.label: III Aggregate reported amount
children.text: The term “aggregate reported amount” means the aggregate amount of dividends reported by the company under clause (i) as capital gain dividends for the taxable year (including capital gain dividends paid after the close of the taxable year described in section 855).

children.heading: Post-December reported amount
children.label: IV Post-December reported amount
children.text: The term “post-December reported amount” means the aggregate reported amount determined by taking into account only dividends paid after December 31 of the taxable year.

children.heading: Adjustment for determinations
children.label: v Adjustment for determinations
children.text: If there is an increase in the excess described in subparagraph (A) for the taxable year which results from a determination (as defined in section 860(e)), the company may, subject to the limitations of this subparagraph, increase the amount of capital gain dividends reported under clause (i).

children.heading: Special rule for losses late in the calendar year
children.label: vi Special rule for losses late in the calendar year

children.heading: Treatment by shareholders of undistributed capital gains
children.label: D Treatment by shareholders of undistributed capital gains
i
children.text: Every shareholder of a regulated investment company at the close of the company’s taxable year shall include, in computing his long-term capital gains in his return for his taxable year in which the last day of the company’s taxable year falls, such amount as the company shall designate in respect of such shares in a written notice mailed to its shareholders at any time prior to the expiration of 60 days after close of its taxable year, but the amount so includible by any shareholder shall not exceed that part of the amount subjected to tax in subparagraph (A) which he would have received if all of such amount had been distributed as capital gain dividends by the company to the holders of such shares at the close of its taxable year.

children.label: ii
children.text: For purposes of this title, every such shareholder shall be deemed to have paid, for his taxable year under clause (i), the tax imposed by subparagraph (A) on the amounts required by this subparagraph to be included in respect of such shares in computing his long-term capital gains for that year; and such shareholder shall be allowed credit or refund, as the case may be, for the tax so deemed to have been paid by him.

children.label: iii
children.text: The adjusted basis of such shares in the hands of the shareholder shall be increased, with respect to the amounts required by this subparagraph to be included in computing his long-term capital gains, by the difference between the amount of such includible gains and the tax deemed paid by such shareholder in respect of such shares under clause (ii).

children.label: iv
children.text: In the event of such designation the tax imposed by subparagraph (A) shall be paid by the regulated investment company within 30 days after close of its taxable year.

children.label: v
children.text: The earnings and profits of such regulated investment company, and the earnings and profits of any such shareholder which is a corporation, shall be appropriately adjusted in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.label: i
children.text: shall not be included in computing such shareholder’s long-term capital gains, and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall be included in such shareholder’s gross income as a dividend from the regulated investment company.

children.heading: Losses incurred under a periodic liquidation plan
children.label: D Losses incurred under a periodic liquidation plan
children.text: To the extent provided in regulations, subparagraphs (A) and (B) shall not apply to losses incurred on the sale or exchange of shares of stock in a regulated investment company pursuant to a plan which provides for the periodic liquidation of such shares.

children.heading: Exception to holding period requirement for certain regularly declared exempt-interest dividends
children.label: E Exception to holding period requirement for certain regularly declared exempt-interest dividends

children.heading: Daily dividend companies
children.label: i Daily dividend companies
children.text: Except as otherwise provided by regulations, subparagraph (B) shall not apply with respect to a regular dividend paid by a regulated investment company which declares exempt-interest dividends on a daily basis in an amount equal to at least 90 percent of its net tax-exempt interest and distributes such dividends on a monthly or more frequent basis.

children.heading: Authority to shorten required holding period with respect to other companies
children.label: ii Authority to shorten required holding period with respect to other companies
children.text: In the case of a regulated investment company (other than a company described in clause (i)) which regularly distributes at least 90 percent of its net tax-exempt interest, the Secretary may by regulations prescribe that subparagraph (B) (and subparagraph (C) to the extent it relates to subparagraph (B)) shall be applied on the basis of a holding period requirement shorter than 6 months; except that such shorter holding period requirement shall not be shorter than the greater of 31 days or the period between regular distributions of exempt-interest dividends.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), an exempt-interest dividend is any dividend or part thereof (other than a capital gain dividend) paid by a regulated investment company and reported by the company as an exempt-interest dividend in written statements furnished to its shareholders.

children.label: I

children.heading: Allocation of excess reported amount
children.label: iii Allocation of excess reported amount

children.heading: In general
children.label: I In general
children.text: Except as provided in subclause (II), the excess reported amount (if any) which is allocable to the reported exempt-interest dividend amount is that portion of the excess reported amount which bears the same ratio to the excess reported amount as the reported exempt-interest dividend amount bears to the aggregate reported amount.

children.heading: Special rule for noncalendar year taxpayers
children.label: II Special rule for noncalendar year taxpayers
children.text: In the case of any taxable year which does not begin and end in the same calendar year, if the post-December reported amount equals or exceeds the excess reported amount for such taxable year, subclause (I) shall be applied by substituting “post-December reported amount” for “aggregate reported amount” and no excess reported amount shall be allocated to any dividend paid on or before December 31 of such taxable year.

children.heading: Reported exempt-interest dividend amount
children.label: I Reported exempt-interest dividend amount
children.text: The term “reported exempt-interest dividend amount” means the amount reported to its shareholders under clause (i) as an exempt-interest dividend.

children.heading: Excess reported amount
children.label: II Excess reported amount
children.text: The term “excess reported amount” means the excess of the aggregate reported amount over the exempt interest of the company for the taxable year.

children.heading: Aggregate reported amount
children.label: III Aggregate reported amount
children.text: The term “aggregate reported amount” means the aggregate amount of dividends reported by the company under clause (i) as exempt-interest dividends for the taxable year (including exempt-interest dividends paid after the close of the taxable year described in section 855).

children.heading: Post-December reported amount
children.label: IV Post-December reported amount
children.text: The term “post-December reported amount” means the aggregate reported amount determined by taking into account only dividends paid after December 31 of the taxable year.

children.heading: Exempt interest
children.label: V Exempt interest
children.text: The term “exempt interest” means, with respect to any regulated investment company, the excess of the amount of interest excludable from gross income under section 103(a) over the amounts disallowed as deductions under sections 265 and 171(a)(2).

children.heading: Treatment of exempt-interest dividends by shareholders
children.label: B Treatment of exempt-interest dividends by shareholders
i
children.text: the determination of gross income and taxable income,

children.label: ii

children.label: iii
children.text: the allowance of, or calculation of the amount of, any credit or deduction, and

children.label: iv
children.text: the determination of the basis in the hands of any shareholder of any share of stock of the company.

children.heading: Section 311(b) not to apply to certain distributions
children.label: 6 Section 311(b) not to apply to certain distributions
children.text: Section 311(b) shall not apply to any distribution by a regulated investment company to which this part applies, if such distribution is in redemption of its stock upon the demand of the shareholder.

children.label: 7 Time certain dividends taken into account

children.heading: Elective deferral of certain late-year losses
children.label: 8 Elective deferral of certain late-year losses

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided by the Secretary, a regulated investment company may elect for any taxable year to treat any portion of any qualified late-year loss for such taxable year as arising on the first day of the following taxable year for purposes of this title.

children.heading: Late-year ordinary loss
children.label: D Late-year ordinary loss
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “late-year ordinary loss” means the sum of any post-October specified loss and any post-December ordinary loss.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: The earnings and profits of a regulated investment company for any taxable year (but not its accumulated earnings and profits) shall not be reduced by any amount which is not allowable as a deduction (other than by reason of section 265 or 171(a)(2)) in computing its taxable income for such taxable year.

children.heading: Coordination with treatment of net capital losses
children.label: ii Coordination with treatment of net capital losses

children.heading: Regulated investment company
children.label: 4 Regulated investment company
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “regulated investment company” includes a domestic corporation which is a regulated investment company determined without regard to the requirements of subsection (a).

children.label: C Effect on dividends paid deduction
children.text: Any qualified designated distribution shall not be included in the amount of dividends paid for purposes of computing the dividends paid deduction for any taxable year.

children.heading: Coordination with subtitle F
children.label: B Coordination with subtitle F
children.text: Any interest payable under subparagraph (A) may be assessed and collected at any time during the period during which any tax imposed for the taxable year in which the determination is made may be assessed and collected.

children.heading: Provision not to apply in the case of fraud
children.label: 4 Provision not to apply in the case of fraud
children.text: The provisions of this subsection shall not apply if the determination contains a finding that the failure to meet any requirement of this part was due to fraud with intent to evade tax.

children.heading: Determination
children.label: 5 Determination
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “determination” has the meaning given to such term by section 860(e). Such term also includes a determination by the investment company filed with the Secretary that the provisions of this part do not apply to the investment company for a taxable year.

children.heading: Treatment of certain load charges
children.label: f Treatment of certain load charges
A
children.text: the taxpayer incurs a load charge in acquiring stock in a regulated investment company and, by reason of incurring such charge or making such acquisition, the taxpayer acquires a reinvestment right,

children.label: B
children.text: such stock is disposed of before the 91st day after the date on which such stock was acquired, and

children.label: C
children.text: the taxpayer acquires, during the period beginning on the date of the disposition referred to in subparagraph (B) and ending on January 31 of the calendar year following the calendar year that includes the date of such disposition, stock in such regulated investment company or in another regulated investment company and the otherwise applicable load charge is reduced by reason of the reinvestment right,

children.heading: Load charge
children.label: A Load charge
children.text: The term “load charge” means any sales or similar charge incurred by a person in acquiring stock of a regulated investment company. Such term does not include any charge incurred by reason of the reinvestment of a dividend.

children.heading: Reinvestment right
children.label: B Reinvestment right
children.text: The term “reinvestment right” means any right to acquire stock of 1 or more regulated investment companies without the payment of a load charge or with the payment of a reduced charge.

children.heading: Nonrecognition transactions
children.label: C Nonrecognition transactions
children.text: If the taxpayer acquires stock in a regulated investment company from another person in a transaction in which gain or loss is not recognized, the taxpayer shall succeed to the treatment of such other person under this subsection.

children.heading: Special rules for fund of funds
children.label: g Special rules for fund of funds
A
children.text: such fund shall be qualified to pay exempt-interest dividends to its shareholders without regard to whether such fund satisfies the requirements of the first sentence of subsection (b)(5), and

children.label: B
children.text: such fund may elect the application of section 853 (relating to foreign tax credit allowed to shareholders) without regard to the requirement of subsection (a)(1) thereof.

children.heading: Qualified fund of funds
children.label: 2 Qualified fund of funds
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “qualified fund of funds” means a regulated investment company if (at the close of each quarter of the taxable year) at least 50 percent of the value of its total assets is represented by interests in other regulated investment companies.
